title: Beach Party — Common Verbs
description: Ten verbs you'll use every day — EAT, DRINK, SLEEP, WALK, READ, WATCH, SWIM, DANCE, LAUGH, RUN — through a Saturday at the beach.
summary_pt_br: Dez verbos fundamentais do cotidiano em inglês, treinados num cenário de festa na praia. Presente simples com he/she/it -s revisitado.

scenes.text_en:
Saturday, 4 p.m. The beach is loud.
Rafa COOKS. Maya DANCES. Joca READS his laptop (he does that everywhere).
Cosmo RUNS after a ball. Mr. Kumar WATCHES, calm.
Dona Lúcia LAUGHS at a joke only she gets.
The sun SETS. The party RISES.
scenes.text_pt:
Sábado, 16h. A praia está barulhenta.
Rafa COZINHA. Maya DANÇA. Joca LÊ o laptop (faz isso em todo lugar).
Cosmo CORRE atrás de uma bola. Mr. Kumar ASSISTE, calmo.
Dona Lúcia RI de uma piada que só ela entende.
O sol SE PÕE. A festa COMEÇA.

scenes.title: Third-person -s (again, but real this time)
scenes.body_en: With he/she/it, add -s to the verb. Most verbs just add -s: eat → eats, sleep → sleeps. Verbs ending in -y after a consonant change -y to -ies: cry → cries, study → studies. Verbs ending in -s, -sh, -ch, -x, -o add -es: watch → watches, do → does, go → goes.
scenes.body_pt: Com he/she/it, adiciona -s. Maioria dos verbos: só -s (eat → eats). Verbos em -y depois de consoante: -y vira -ies (cry → cries). Verbos em -s, -sh, -ch, -x, -o: -es (watch → watches, go → goes).

exercise.question: Which is correct?
exercise.explanation: STUDY → STUDIES. Y after a consonant becomes IES.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Y depois de consoante: vira IES. Study → studies.

turns.en: Cosmo runs, swims, and eats — in that order.
turns.pt: O Cosmo corre, nada e come — nessa ordem.

turns.en: He sleeps like he runs. With his whole body.
turns.pt: Ele dorme igual corre. Com o corpo todo.

exercise.explanation: Five third-person patterns. Almost every verb fits one of these.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Cinco padrões. Quase todo verbo cabe em um.

scenes.title: A beach party invitation
scenes.pt_summary: Verbos de ação em festa — dance, play, swim, eat, drink.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Hi! We are having a beach party tonight.
turns.pt: Oi! Vamos ter uma festa na praia hoje à noite.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I can come. Should I bring something?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Bring food to share if you want.
turns.pt: Traz comida pra compartilhar se quiser.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I will bring drinks and snacks.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Great. We are going to dance and swim.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Cool. Do you play music there?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Yes, I play the guitar and we all sing.
turns.pt: Sim, toco violão e todo mundo canta.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I cannot wait. See you at seven.

scenes.title: Listening story — Beach Party — Common Verbs
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça a situação com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que você entendeu — resumo, detalhes, seus pensamentos. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Write in English what you heard. A short summary is fine. Mention who spoke, what they said, and what you think about the situation.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que você ouviu. Pode ser um resumo curto. Diga quem falou, o que disseram e o que você achou.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In this story, we meet Bia and a student. Ten verbs you'll use every day — EAT, DRINK, SLEEP, WALK, READ, WATCH, SWIM, DANCE, LAUGH, RUN — through a Saturday at the beach. Listen carefully and think about what each person says.

paragraphs.speaker: Bia
paragraphs.en: Hi! We are having a beach party tonight.

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: Yes, I can come. Should I bring something?

paragraphs.speaker: Bia
paragraphs.en: Bring food to share if you want.

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: I will bring drinks and snacks.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: That is the end of our short scene with Bia. Think about what you heard and how the conversation felt.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Beach Party — Common Verbs". Ten verbs you'll use every day — EAT, DRINK, SLEEP, WALK, READ, WATCH, SWIM, DANCE, LAUGH, RUN — through a Saturday at the beach. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Beach Party — Common Verbs". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'Beach Party — Common Verbs'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "Beach Party — Common Verbs".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.

sources.label: VOA Learning English
sources.pt_hint: Notícias em inglês lento — ótimo para ouvido iniciante.

sources.label: English Grammar In Use (preview)
